channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-06 to 2026-07-12
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 17 kt ENE, water 69°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.8 sec); wind too strong (17 kt); wind direction off (ENE). Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.9 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.9 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (N). Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.2 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 8 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.2 ft); period too short (5.9 sec); wind direction off (NNE). Thu 2026-07-09: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft). Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 6 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 72°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 5 kt SSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSW).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Mon 2026-07-06: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 17 kt ENE, water 69°F. Low tide: 05:54, 18:21. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.8 sec); wind too strong (17 kt); wind direction off (ENE).
  • Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.9 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.9 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (N).
  • Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.2 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 8 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.2 ft); period too short (5.9 sec); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Thu 2026-07-09: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft).
  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 6 kt WSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 72°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 5 kt SSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SSW).
